evaluation.summary: Empirical data for primorial gaps up to k=12 show the variance‑to‑mean ratio R(k) increases slowly, suggesting a logarithmic trend that contradicts earlier power‑law expectations.
next_directions: Extend the analysis to larger primorial indices to assess the long‑term trend
Apply rigorous statistical model comparison between logarithmic and power‑law fits
Develop a theoretical framework linking primorial gaps to variance scaling
